---
title: "Fanny Harrison"
---

## Fanny Harrison

### Description

The Miss Harrison of St Cross, Weybridge with whom CMY corresponded in 1887 was probably the Fanny Harrison of that address who was a member of the London Library.  She may also have been the Fanny Harrison who published <i>Our Teacher\'s Stories: Attractive stories for Boys and Girls</i> (London: Mowbray 1888).

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 11th

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
